attributes.title: Total Requests
attributes.visState: {"title": "Total Requests", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "Total request events", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: Avg Response Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "Avg Response Time", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "customLabel": "ms avg"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "Labels", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 200}, {"from": 200, "to": 1000}, {"from": 1000, "to": 100000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": true, "subText": "Average response time (ms)", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: P95 Response Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "P95 Response Time", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "percents": [95], "customLabel": "p95 ms"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "Labels", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 500}, {"from": 500, "to": 2000}, {"from": 2000, "to": 100000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": true, "subText": "95th percentile (ms)", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: Response Time Over Time (Avg + P95)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Response Time Over Time (Avg + P95)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "customLabel": "Avg (ms)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "percents": [95], "customLabel": "P95 (ms)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Response Time (ms)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Avg (ms)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "P95 (ms)", "id": "3"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": true, "value": 1000, "width": 1, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Status Code Breakdown
attributes.visState: {"title": "Status Code Breakdown", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "status_class.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: Slowest URLs (by Avg Response Time)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Slowest URLs (by Avg Response Time)", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "customLabel": "Avg (ms)"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "percents": [95], "customLabel": "P95 (ms)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Requests"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "url_path.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 30, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: 5xx Server Errors — Which URLs?
attributes.visState: {"title": "5xx Server Errors — Which URLs?", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Error Count"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "url_path.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 25, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "status", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 12, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: 4xx Client Errors — Which URLs?
attributes.visState: {"title": "4xx Client Errors — Which URLs?", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Error Count"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "url_path.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 25, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "status", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 12, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: Response Time Distribution
attributes.visState: {"title": "Response Time Distribution", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "response_time_bucket.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": true}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Throughput Over Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "Throughput Over Time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Requests"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Requests"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "area", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Requests", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Slow Requests by Content Type
attributes.visState: {"title": "Slow Requests by Content Type", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "customLabel": "Avg Response Time (ms)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Requests"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "content_type.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "horizontal_bar", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Avg Response Time (ms)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Avg Response Time (ms)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": true}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Response Time by Pod
attributes.visState: {"title": "Response Time by Pod", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "customLabel": "Avg (ms)"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "response_time_ms", "percents": [95], "customLabel": "P95 (ms)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Requests"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "pod.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": true, "missingBucketLabel": "(unknown)"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: AEM Request Performance
attributes.description: Response time analysis — avg/p95 latency, slowest URLs, 4xx/5xx breakdown, throughput trends, and per-pod performance. Use this to find slow pages and server errors.
